# Scorched-Earth Erdős Sweep — Turn 152

This is turn 152. Turns 1 through 151 are consolidated in `turns_history__frontiermath_q2_galois.md` (attached). Re-read it before answering.
Also re-read `mega_prompt.md` and `problem_statement.md`.

CRITICAL — use ONLY the files attached to THIS message. Do NOT open, import, retrieve, or cite any file from your File Library / previously uploaded files, even one named similarly (e.g. another `turns_history…md`). Other unrelated problems use similarly named history files in the same account, and importing one will silently switch you onto the wrong problem. If the attached `turns_history__frontiermath_q2_galois.md` appears missing, do NOT continue from partial context. Reply only with `MISSING_REQUIRED_ATTACHMENT` and name the missing file(s); never substitute a library file.

If this turn drifts into hammering one specific case or sub-instance, step back and ask whether the case is revealing a structural pattern that would close many cases at once. Prefer arguments whose conclusion is a uniform statement.

End this response with ESTABLISHED / GAP / NEXT + tag.
Continue with Turn 152.

## Turn 152 — independent machine audit of the frozen \(h_0\) boundary

The byte-exact submission was reconstructed again: **256 bytes**, LF endings, SHA-256  
`4f81b04ae00e737a244f2445d70b095333a427508958f11489e3cabdc0192fdc`, matching Turns 149–151. 

[Download the exact \(h_0\) submission](sandbox:/mnt/data/q2_galois_h0_submission.txt)

A separate free-word and Magnus-expansion audit then verified:

- The pro-\(2\) specialization is exactly
  \[
  x_0^{\sigma^2}x_0[x_1,\sigma]=1.
  \]
- After the stated change of generators, its cyclic reduction agrees with the inverse of the standard local Demuškin relator.
- Its abelianized exponent vector is \((0,2,0)\) on \((\sigma,x_0,x_1)\), giving the required \(\mathbf Z_2^2\oplus C_2\) shape.
- Its mod-\(2\) quadratic Magnus term is
  \[
  X_0^2+SX_1+X_1S,
  \]
  whose cup/Bockstein matrix has rank \(3\).

[Download the reproducible boundary-audit script](sandbox:/mnt/data/h0_boundary_audit.py)

**ESTABLISHED**: Independently machine-verified the exact marked maximal pro-\(2\) boundary of the frozen \(h_0\) word, including its standard-relator equivalence, abelianization, and nondegenerate quadratic Magnus form. No modification is indicated.

**GAP**: The private 5402-group verifier remains unrun, and the full proof has not received independent external manuscript review.

**NEXT**: Submit the exact frozen file unchanged. Any failure should be localized to the lowest rejected framed-certificate node before altering the presentation.

[CONTINUE]
